3114390.name: LoopReap
3114390.description:
【Translation Notice for the Store Page】

This store page is currently translated from Japanese.
We are working on improving the English translation, but some expressions may not be fully accurate yet.

The game itself is primarily developed in Japanese, and official English localization is not yet confirmed.
We appreciate your understanding and patience as we continue to refine both the game and its translations.

Thank you for your support!

【SUMMARY】

One summer, a university student returns to their hometown, a remote island, to reunite with their high school friends—their inseparable group, "Itsumen."

However, someone who was supposed to be there is missing.

Mika Nanase.
A bright, kind girl who was the heart of the group.
She was said to have taken her own life a year ago.

One of the friends brings up an urban legend about reviving the dead.
"If you recite the wrong cause of death, you'll be trapped in a time loop until you state the correct one."
The occult-loving friend explains with eerie excitement.

Skeptical yet intrigued, they perform the ritual.
However, for some reason, the ritual fails, and they are all caught in a loop.

In other words, Mika Nanase’s cause of death was not suicide.

【Game Overview】

A Loop × Mystery × Exploration Adventure set in a world where 3D and 2D graphics are uniquely blended.

Unravel the lies and uncover the hidden truth within a repeating seven-day cycle.

【System】


《Date System》

The game features a time and day system, where each day is divided into four time periods: morning, noon, evening, and night.

Events and the availability of locations change depending on the time of day, making it crucial to decide when and where to take action.


《Discussion》

Engage in one-on-one conversations with characters, using evidence and information collected during exploration to ask key questions.
Even if you ask the same question, each character may react differently.

  • Questions consume Mental Power (MP). If MP runs out, the discussion cannot continue.

  • Characters’ emotions change based on the questions asked (e.g., anger, sadness, confusion).

  • Emotional shifts may unlock new testimonies or cause the character to shut down entirely.

Managing MP is essential, so using items or performing "Deep Breathing" to stay calm can be critical.
Pay close attention not only to their words but also their expressions and reactions, and choose your actions wisely.
